properties.descricao: People gathered in Beirut in memory of beloved turtle conservationist Mona Khalil, killed in Israeli attack.

properties.titulo_evento: Colombia election: Hard-right candidate claims victory
properties.descricao: Right-wing presidential candidate, Abelardo de la Espriella, won 49.66% of the Colombians' votes, according to preliminary results. Outgoing President Gustavo Petro said "neither candidate can be declared president."
